Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Class OfxV2Writer.TransactionData

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer.TransactionData
Enclosing class:
OfxV2Writer
public static class OfxV2Writer.TransactionData extends Object
Inner class to hold data for a single transaction, used by the OFX writer methods.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    amount
    Amount of the transaction as a string.
    String
    checkNum
    Check number, if applicable.
    String
    date
    Date of the transaction (OFX format: YYYYMMDD).
    String
    memo
    Memo or description for the transaction.
    String
    name
    Name or payee of the transaction.
    String
    type
    Type of transaction (e.g., "CREDIT", "DEBIT", "CHECK").

  • Field Details

    • type

      public String type
      Type of transaction (e.g., "CREDIT", "DEBIT", "CHECK").

    • date

      public String date
      Date of the transaction (OFX format: YYYYMMDD).

    • amount

      public String amount
      Amount of the transaction as a string.

    • checkNum

      public String checkNum
      Check number, if applicable. Can be null.

    • name

      public String name
      Name or payee of the transaction.

    • memo

      public String memo
      Memo or description for the transaction.

  • Constructor Details

    • TransactionData

      public TransactionData(String type, String date, String amount, String checkNum, String name, String memo)
      Constructs a TransactionData object.
      Parameters:
      type - The type of the transaction.
      date - The date of the transaction.
      amount - The amount of the transaction.
      checkNum - The check number (can be null).
      name - The name/payee of the transaction.
      memo - The memo for the transaction.
